synopsis: Cross-OS user/system cleanup (Windows side). Thin dispatcher onto `scripts/os/run.ps1 clean` with plan-then-confirm and --dry-run.

messages.PlanEmpty: Plan is empty -- nothing queued. Exiting.
messages.ConfirmNo: Aborted by operator. No changes made.
messages.VerifyPass: VERIFY: {0} category(ies) PASS, no residue detected.
messages.VerifyFail: VERIFY: {0} category(ies) FAIL -- residue rows remain (see summary).
messages.DryRunBanner: [DRY-RUN] Preview only. No deletions, no service stops, no prompts.
